caption: The video features a man sitting in what appears to be a podcast or radio studio, set within a clothing store. He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK." The man is engaged in speaking into a microphone, likely recording a podcast episode for "Boss Talk 101," as indicated by the logo in the bottom right corner of the screen. The background is filled with framed photographs on the wall, a mannequin dressed in a white shirt, and racks of clothing, suggesting a casual yet professional atmosphere. His expressions and gestures indicate he is actively communicating, possibly sharing stories or insights related to the theme of the podcast.
